message:
Simplify: extract shared isSafePath, fix TOCTOU, tighten types

- Extract isSafePath to src/api/safe-path.ts, used by both results
  routes and static file serving
- Remove unused realpathSync import from results.ts
- Add try-catch around static file stat/read sequence (TOCTOU)
- Use discriminated union for WebSocket RunMessage type, removing
  optional field fallbacks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
